batch_1.name: Greenscreens.ai
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Brokers price on gut feel; real bottleneck is decision latency on lane-level margin, not missing dashboards

batch_1.name: Vooma
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Email/call triage volume hides the real problem: unstructured load data never reaches TMS in time to book

batch_1.name: HappyRobot
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Voice automation fails when handoffs to humans lack structured context; bottleneck is operational trust in the signal

batch_1.name: FleetWorks
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Covering loads is a parallel-calling problem, not a CRM problem; speed-to-book beats more carrier lists

batch_1.name: Drumkit
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Brokers buy "AI email" but stall on exception handling; real gap is workflow state across TMS + inbox

batch_1.name: Burt
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: "Automation" breaks on unstructured PDFs and exceptions; need operators-in-the-loop with structured handoffs

batch_1.name: Cartage
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Replacing brokers requires shippers to trust exception routing, not just cheaper rates

batch_1.name: Lanesurf
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Parallel carrier negotiation is the product; bottleneck is rate discipline under inbound call floods

batch_1.name: Avoca AI
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Inbound call deflection fails without job-cost context; need structured intake before handoff

batch_1.name: BuildOps
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Dispatch + invoicing fragmentation; AI must compress quote-to-schedule, not add chatbots

batch_1.name: Alvys
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Small fleets need quoting + dispatch in one flow; separate tools recreate phone-tag

batch_1.name: Numeo
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Owner-operators need instant quote-to-dispatch; manual dispatch is the margin killer

batch_1.name: Supermove
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Moving ops still quote-by-phone; CV + OR quoting is the wedge

batch_1.name: Pando
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: Network effects need standardized lane + cost data; bottleneck is ingestion not visualization

batch_1.name: Vizion
batch_1.bottleneck_hypothesis: ETA prediction worthless without dock appointment and drayage handoff automation
